title: Shrimp and Citrus Salad
description: A refreshing French-inspired salad featuring succulent shrimp, tangy citrus, and a hint of Thai spice.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together citrusy dressing, Thai chili paste, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook until pink and cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the shrimp to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the red onion and cook until slightly caramelized, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed greens to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 1-2 minutes.
Slice the baguette into 1-inch pieces and toast until lightly browned.
To assemble the salad, place a portion of the mixed greens on a plate, top with a few slices of toasted baguette, and arrange the cooked shrimp on top.
Drizzle the citrusy dressing over the salad and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
